$schema: Add a new object to the games array for each HTML5 game. Put the game's files in /games/<id>/ with an index.html entry point. thumbnail is optional — path an image inside the game's own folder, e.g. games/pixel-runner/thumb.png. If omitted, the site shows an auto-generated glass placeholder tile.

games.title: Sample Game
games.description: A placeholder entry showing the shape games-list.json expects. Replace or delete this once you add real games.
games.controls: Arrow keys to move, Space to jump
